title: Vidyasagar University Results 2026 - Key Highlights

detail.title: Vidyasagar University Results 2026 - Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Vidyasagar University Result 2026 has been declared for PG 3rd Semester Examinations 2025 (VU Campus students) including Applied Mathematics, Microbiology, Bio‑Medical Laboratory Science & Management, Human Physiology, Philosophy, Sanskrit and History. Check your Vidyasagar University 3rd sem PG result and download the marksheet online from exam.vidyasagar.ac.in.

content.text: The Vidyasagar University 3rd Semester Result 2026 for PG 3rd Semester Examinations 2025 (VU Campus students only) has been officially published on 23–03–2026, with the update available to students on 23–03–2026 / 23–03–2026 cycle and onward result date 23–03–2026, referenced for your article date 23–03–2026. As per the notification from the Office of the Controller of Examinations, Vidyasagar University, Midnapore, results have been released for several postgraduate programmes and students can now download an electronic copy of their 3rd semester marksheet from the official examination portal.

By visiting http://exam.vidyasagar.ac.in/ (linked from the university website vidyasagar.ac.in), candidates can check their Vidyasagar University PG 3rd Semester Result 2025–26 and use it for academic progression, review applications and record‑keeping.

Vidyasagar University has published the 3rd semester PG result 2025 for campus‑based students across multiple departments, with the result preparation approved by the competent authority of the university. In addition, the notification clearly mentions the review (rechecking) window and directs students to use the online portal for script review applications within the prescribed dates.

headers: Vidyasagar University 3rd Semester Result 2026 – Key Highlights
rows: Vidyasagar University, Midnapore, Paschim Medinipur, West Bengal
23 March 2026 (PG 3rd Semester Examinations 2025 – VU Campus Students)
Applied Mathematics; Microbiology; Bio‑Medical Laboratory Science & Management; Human Physiology; Philosophy; Sanskrit; History
Vidyasagar University Campus Students only (PG 3rd Semester)
Electronic copy of marksheet available through the examination portal
Online review of 3rd semester answer scripts starts from 23‑03‑2026, 16:00 hrs; last date 30‑03‑2026, via exam portal

content.text: Vidyasagar University has activated the direct link for checking PG 3rd semester results 2025 through its examination portal. Students can instantly view or download their marksheet via the official Vidyasagar University result page using the link below and their examination credentials.

links.label: PG 3rd Semester Examinations 2025 Result – VU Campus Students (Applied Mathematics, Microbiology, Bio‑Medical Laboratory Science & Management, Human Physiology, Philosophy, Sanskrit, History)

sections.heading: How to Check Vidyasagar University 3rd Semester Result 2026?

content.text: Follow the steps below to check your Vidyasagar University PG 3rd Semester Result 2025–26 from the official examination website:

items: Open the official examination portal http://exam.vidyasagar.ac.in/ in your browser.
On the exam portal, look for the section or link related to “PG 3rd Semester Examination 2025 – Result” for campus students; this may be under a Results or Student Login/Result area.

Select your Postgraduate Programme (e.g., Applied Mathematics, Microbiology, Bio‑Medical Laboratory Science & Management, Human Physiology, Philosophy, Sanskrit or History) and the 3rd Semester 2025 examination from the available options.
Enter your required login details such as Roll Number / Registration Number / University ID, as asked on the result page, and submit the form.
Your Vidyasagar University 3rd semester marksheet will appear on the screen, showing subject‑wise marks/grades, total marks and overall result status.

Download or print the electronic copy of the marksheet for academic reference, scholarship or higher‑study applications; keep it until the original hard‑copy marksheet is issued through the university.
If you find any discrepancy in the result, inform the Controller of Examinations office within 7 days from the date of publication of the result, as instructed in the notification.

For students wishing to apply for review of answer scripts, revisit http://exam.vidyasagar.ac.in/ from 23‑03‑2026, 16:00 hrs onwards, fill the online review application form, and pay the requisite fee before 30‑03‑2026.
